user_query:
I’m a very grateful dad and an avid runner. Please help me turn my notes into two thank‑you email drafts for the pediatric surgery team that cared for my son—one in English and a faithful Spanish version for the bilingual nurse—and a short group chat message to my run club about a charity 10K.

Requirements and inputs:
- Read and extract details from input/visit_summary.txt and input/draft_points.md to write the emails. For the run club message, also use input/run_club_notes.md.
- English email (save to outputs/email_thankyou_en.txt): include a clear Subject line and a concise, heartfelt body that (a) names Dr. A. Patel and Nurse Maria, (b) mentions “6 West”, (c) references at least two specific items from the “Memorable support” list in input/visit_summary.txt in your own words, and (d) mentions that I’m training for the Riverfront 10K to honor the team, as noted in input/draft_points.md.
- Spanish email (save to outputs/email_thankyou_es.txt): produce a faithful, formal translation of the English body. Use “usted/ustedes” tone (not tú), include a greeting with “Estimado/Estimada”, and explicitly include the phrase “equipo de pediatría”. Do not add content not present in the English version.
- Validate the Spanish email using the provided linter at input/spanish_lint.py. Save the validator’s output to outputs/spanish_lint.log and revise the Spanish draft until the final log ends with the line “WARNINGS: 0”. (If the linter reports warnings, adjust the Spanish text accordingly and re‑run until clean.)
- Run club message (save to outputs/message_runclub.txt): a friendly, concise group chat post that pulls the date/time, meet location, route, pace, and cause from input/run_club_notes.md. Mention my gratitude to the hospital team and that we’ll share the fundraiser link later (don’t invent a link).

General constraints:
- Do not fabricate names, dates, or locations—only use details present in the input files.
- Keep each draft self‑contained and ready to paste into email or chat.
- Deliverables: outputs/email_thankyou_en.txt, outputs/email_thankyou_es.txt, outputs/message_runclub.txt, and outputs/spanish_lint.log that ends with “WARNINGS: 0”. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
